task: TASK: Open the main React App component and change the main header text of the Kanban board to say "NMG Forge Kanban Board" instead of its current title.
plan:
## Task Summary Update the main React application UI so the Kanban board’s primary header text reads **“NMG Forge Kanban Board”** instead of the current title. ## Implementation Plan 1. Open the main React app entry component. 2. Locate the primary Kanban board header element, likely an `

` or `

`. 3. Replace the current header text with: ```text NMG Forge Kanban Board ``` 4. Preserve surrounding styling, JSX structure, className attributes, and layout. 5. Run the app locally to confirm the new title displays correctly. 6. If tests exist, run them to ensure no UI assertions break due to the changed text. ## Files To Modify - `src/App.jsx` or - `src/App.js` Primary edit example: ```jsx

NMG Forge Kanban Board

``` ## Risks - The header text may exist in a child Kanban component rather than directly in `App`. - Existing snapshot or unit tests may assert the old header text. - A global page title, such as ``, may also need updating separately. - Case sensitivity or whitespace could affect display or test matching. ## Next Action Search the source code for the current header text or `Kanban`, then update the relevant header element in the main app component to: ```text NMG Forge Kanban Board ```
